scenarios.title: Calculate favorable MTM and derive net margin

given_steps.step_text: Market value of portfolio is -300,550,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Market value of portfolio is -300,550,000 HKD

given_steps.step_text: Contract value of portfolio is -287,850,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Contract value of portfolio is -287,850,000 HKD

given_steps.step_text: Rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin is 46,930,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin is 46,930,000 HKD

when_steps.step_text: Step 1 calculates favorable MTM using the formula
when_steps.step_pattern: Step 1 calculates favorable MTM using the formula

when_steps.step_text: Step 2 deducts favorable MTM from rounded aggregated margin
when_steps.step_pattern: Step 2 deducts favorable MTM from rounded aggregated margin

then_steps.step_text: Favorable MTM equals -12,700,000 HKD (negative indicates MTM requirement)
then_steps.step_pattern: Favorable MTM equals -12,700,000 HKD (negative indicates MTM requirement)

then_steps.step_text: Favorable MTM is zero when result is negative
then_steps.step_pattern: Favorable MTM is zero when result is negative

then_steps.step_text: Net margin equals Maximum(0, 46,930,000 - 0) = 46,930,000 HKD
then_steps.step_pattern: Net margin equals Maximum(0, 46,930,000 - 0) = 46,930,000 HKD

assumptions: Negative favorable MTM result indicates MTM requirement, not favorable MTM
MTM requirement absolute value is added after applying margin credit per §3.2.6.1

scenarios.title: Net margin at zero when favorable MTM equals aggregated margin

given_steps.step_pattern: Rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin is 50,000,000 HKD

given_steps.step_text: Favorable MTM is 50,000,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Favorable MTM is 50,000,000 HKD

when_steps.step_text: Step 2 calculates net margin using Maximum(0, Rounded aggregated margin – Favorable MTM)
when_steps.step_pattern: Step 2 calculates net margin using Maximum(0, Rounded aggregated margin – Favorable MTM)

then_steps.step_text: Net margin equals Maximum(0, 50,000,000 - 50,000,000) = 0 HKD
then_steps.step_pattern: Net margin equals Maximum(0, 50,000,000 - 50,000,000) = 0 HKD

assumptions: This tests the boundary condition where net margin reaches zero floor
